The Door class represents a door on the GameMap.

GameMap
The GameMap class represents the 2D map of Chip's Challenge.
GameMap1
The GameMap1 class represents the subclass of GameMap.
GameMap2
The GameMap2 class represents the subclass of GameMap.
GamePanel
The GamePanel class is responsible for rendering the entire game world, including the map tiles, Chip, and all enemy entities.

Styling
The Styling class centralizes all UI styling, formatting, and popup window creation for Chip's Challenge.
